# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

plugins:
  - name: cors
    enabled: true
    config:
      origins:
        - http://example.com
      methods:
        - GET
        - POST
      headers:
        - Accept
        - Content-Type
  - name: key-auth
    enabled: true
    config:
      key_names:
        - apikey
  - name: rate-limiting
    enabled: true
    config:
      minute: 100
      policy: local

services:
  - name: example-service
    url: http://example.com
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        enabled: true
        config:
          origins:
            - http://example.com
          methods:
            - GET
            - POST
          headers:
            - Accept
            - Content-Type
      - name: key-auth
        enabled: true
        config:
          key_names:
            - apikey
      - name: rate-limiting
        enabled: true
        config:
          minute: 100
          policy: local

routes:
  - name: example-route
    paths:
      - /example
    plugins:
      - name: cors
        enabled: true
        config:
          origins:
            - http://example.com
          methods:
            - GET
            - POST
          headers:
            - Accept
            - Content-Type
      - name: key-auth
        enabled: true
        config:
          key_names:
            - apikey
      - name: rate-limiting
        enabled: true
        config:
          minute: 100
          policy: local
